ambient.tlua(1,16): error TS2819: Namespace name cannot be 'some.native.module'.
ambient.tlua(1,37): error TS1005: ';' expected.
importAlias.tlua(1,1): error TS2304: Cannot find name 'declare'.
importAlias.tlua(1,16): error TS2304: Cannot find name 'Foo'.
importAlias.tlua(1,16): error TS2819: Namespace name cannot be 'Foo'.


==== ambient.tlua (3 errors) ====
    declare module "some.native.module" {
    ~~~~~~~
!!! error TS2304: Cannot find name 'declare'.
                   ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TS2819: Namespace name cannot be 'some.native.module'.
                                        ~
!!! error TS1005: ';' expected.
      local x: number;
    }
    
==== importAlias.tlua (3 errors) ====
    declare module Foo {
    ~~~~~~~
!!! error TS2304: Cannot find name 'declare'.
                   ~~~
!!! error TS2304: Cannot find name 'Foo'.
                   ~~~
!!! error TS2819: Namespace name cannot be 'Foo'.
      local y: number;
    }
